entries.question: cadence loop で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: retire-candidate review も runtime-backed になった。残りは cadence trigger guidance と invocation ergonomics を同じ operating loop に寄せることです。
entries.expectation_state: alignment pulse, self-audit, and retire review now all have runtime surfaces
entries.mismatch_state: cadence still depends on explicit operator invocation rather than trigger-assisted follow-through
entries.scale_direction: narrow TASK-004 toward runtime-backed cadence trigger guidance

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: cadence still depends on explicit operator invocation; trigger guidance and invocation ergonomics remain weaker than the new runtime artifacts
entries.expectation_state: alignment pulse, self-audit, and retire review now all have runtime-backed surfaces
entries.mismatch_state: cadence still depends on explicit operator invocation; trigger guidance and invocation ergonomics remain weaker than the new runtime artifacts
entries.scale_direction: define runtime-backed cadence trigger guidance and keep TASK-004 focused on follow-through ergonomics

entries.question: retire candidate review で何を決めたか
entries.answer: Keep TASK-004 open while cadence trigger guidance is still the next slice
entries.expectation_state: retire-candidate task stayed open after runtime-backed review
entries.scale_direction: keep the task visible in the next cadence review
